sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MDRR Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
feed.summary: This article provides recent news and dividend information for Medalist Diversified REIT (MDRR). It lists quarterly dividend declarations from December 2025 back to April 2025, alongside mentions of insider buying and ex-dividend dates. The page also offers current stock price data for MDRR.

feed.title: [144] ZTO Express (Cayman) Inc. SE... | ZTO SEC Filing - Form 144
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by ZTO Express (Cayman) Inc., indicating a proposed sale of 1,000,000 Class A Ordinary Shares by Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC. The shares, acquired by purchase in 2016 from the Issuer for cash, have an aggregate market value of $24,320,000 and are to be sold on the NYSE. The filing also confirms no other securities of the issuer have been sold by the person in the past three months.

feed.title: Analysts Set Expectations for NextEra Energy FY2027 Earnings
feed.summary: Erste Group has slightly lowered its FY2027 earnings per share forecast for NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) to $4.37 from $4.38, maintaining a "Buy" rating on the stock. Despite beating Q4 EPS estimates, NextEra missed revenue expectations but saw a 20.7% year-over-year increase. The company announced a dividend increase to $0.6232 per share, while insiders sold approximately 190,816 shares worth $17.1 million last quarter.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. stock faces critical juncture amid robotic surgery market evolution and adoption challenges
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISIN: US46120E6023) faces increased competition in the robotic surgery market despite its dominance with the da Vinci system. Key drivers for 2026 valuation include procedure growth, international expansion, and progress with its Ion platform, but valuation is vulnerable to competitive pricing, reimbursement changes, and potential growth slowdowns. The company's financial model is strong, with high margins from recurring revenue, but it must navigate new entrants, legacy players integrating robotics, and potential regulatory delays for next-gen platforms.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Sherwin-Williams to $360 From $375, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has adjusted its price target for Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) to $360 from $375, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised valuation perspective from the firm. Other analysts have also recently updated their price targets for Sherwin-Williams, with some lowering targets but maintaining Outperform or Buy ratings.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) CFO Sells $596,740.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) CFO Neil Dougherty sold 2,000 shares of the company's stock on March 24th for a total of $596,740.00, reducing his stake by 1.57%. This transaction was disclosed in an SEC filing and follows strong Q1 earnings where Keysight beat EPS and revenue expectations. Analysts have largely maintained positive ratings, with an average target price around $298.82, amid positive sentiment regarding the company's manufacturing expansion, product innovations, and AI/HPC opportunities.

feed.title: Jeffrey Li Sells 2,000 Shares of Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) Stock
feed.summary: Jeffrey Li, SVP at Keysight Technologies, sold 2,000 shares of company stock for approximately $594,380 on March 24, reducing his stake by 5.48%. The sale was disclosed amidst strong financial performance from Keysight, which recently exceeded quarterly estimates, reported significant revenue growth, and received positive analyst ratings with a "Moderate Buy" consensus. The company is actively expanding its manufacturing and investing in AI/HPC and automotive test solutions, reflecting continued Wall Street confidence despite internal share selling.

feed.title: TRACTOR SUPPLY WITH GRAND OPENING ON SATURDAY
feed.summary: Tractor Supply will celebrate the grand opening of its Roseburg, Oregon store on Saturday, March 29th, from 10:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m. This is the third location in Douglas County and one of 20 planned for Oregon by the end of the year. The celebration will feature Douglas County 4-H, a face painter, and free refreshments.

feed.title: Gartner Faces Class Action Over Contract Value Growth Disclosures
feed.summary: Gartner (NYSE:IT) is facing a securities fraud class action lawsuit alleging misleading statements regarding its contract value growth and operational capabilities, specifically its ability to meet consulting revenue targets. The lawsuit raises questions about the accuracy of Gartner's public disclosures, internal controls, and governance practices, which could have financial and reputational implications for the company. Investors are advised to monitor court rulings and updated disclosures as the case progresses, particularly concerning legal expenses and any mandated changes to reporting.

feed.title: Maersk named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for fifth consecutive year
feed.summary: Maersk has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Third-Party Logistics (3PL) for the fifth consecutive year. This recognition highlights Maersk's strong ability to execute and its comprehensive vision, supported by its broad and integrated logistics offerings. The report positions vendors based on their completeness of vision and ability to execute in the 3PL market.

feed.title: Moody National Bank Trust Division Sells 7,715 Shares of Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: Moody National Bank Trust Division reduced its stake in Procter & Gamble by 26% in the fourth quarter, selling 7,715 shares and now holding 21,963 shares valued at approximately $3.15 million. This divestment comes amidst significant insider selling of P&G shares totaling over $55 million in the past 90 days, though analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $168.33. Other institutional investors, however, have recently increased their positions in the company, contrasting with the divestment by Moody National Bank Trust Division.

feed.title: M-tron Industries 10-K: $54.4M Revenue, $2.62 Diluted EPS
feed.summary: M-tron Industries reported fiscal 2025 revenues of $54.417 million, an 11.0% increase, and diluted earnings per share of $2.62. The revenue growth was driven by defense, avionics, and industrial shipments, although gross margin compressed to 44.4% due to product mix shifts and tariffs. The company also saw its order backlog grow significantly to $76.425 million, with most expected to be filled in 2026-2027.

feed.title: Dorian LPG (NYSE: LPG) fixes 99% of Q1 2026 VLGC days
feed.summary: Dorian LPG Ltd. has announced that it has fixed 99% of its Very Large Gas Carrier (VLGC) fleet's calendar days for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, at rates exceeding $58,000 per day. This update, provided in an 8-K filing and press release, indicates strong charter coverage for its 28-vessel fleet. The company cautioned that these figures are estimates and subject to adjustments as part of its financial closing process.

feed.title: Which Industries’ Stocks Have Lost the Most Since the Iran War Started?
feed.summary: Since the Iran war began on February 28, the Morningstar US Market Index is down 4.3%, with metals and mining, mortgage finance, residential construction, and packaging industries experiencing the steepest declines. These industries are particularly vulnerable to inflation and rising interest rates, which have been exacerbated by surging oil prices and concerns about central bank rate hikes. Conversely, oil and gas sectors have seen significant gains due to increased energy prices.

feed.title: Dorian LPG estimates 99% of Q1 days fixed above $58,000/day
feed.summary: Dorian LPG announced a forward chartering update for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, estimating that 99% of its calendar days are fixed at rates exceeding $58,000 per day. This information was furnished under Regulation FD and incorporated into an 8-K filing. The company noted that forward-looking statements are subject to risks and may differ from actual results, with no obligation to update them.

feed.title: Pensionfund Sabic Purchases Shares of 6,400 Williams-Sonoma, Inc. $WSM
feed.summary: Pensionfund Sabic recently acquired 6,400 shares of Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (WSM) worth $1.143 million in the fourth quarter, increasing institutional ownership to 99.29%. Williams-Sonoma reported strong EPS of $3.04 against an expected $2.90, despite a 4.3% year-over-year revenue decline to $2.36 billion. The company also announced an increased quarterly dividend of $0.76 and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $209.56.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Purchases 772,893 Shares of Lamb Weston $LW

Despite analyst ratings predominantly being "Hold" with an average price target of $52.40, an insider transaction showed Jan Eli B. Craps buying 50,000 shares, increasing his ownership by 20%.

feed.title: 10,500 Shares in Kimberly-Clark Corporation $KMB Purchased by Pensionfund Sabic

Kimberly-Clark also raised its quarterly dividend to $1.28 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend of $5.12 and a 5.2% yield. Despite missing revenue estimates slightly, the company exceeded Q4 EPS expectations and holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $116.42.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Purchases 156,903 Shares of Avery Dennison Corporation $AVY
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly increased its stake in Avery Dennison Corporation, acquiring an additional 156,903 shares in the fourth quarter, boosting its total holdings to 180,240 shares valued at over $32 million. feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Grows Stock Holdings in Invitation Home $INVH

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Has $31.56 Million Position in Ross Stores, Inc. $ROST

Ross Stores recently reported strong quarterly earnings, exceeding analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: 19,100 Shares in Edison International $EIX Bought by Pensionfund Sabic
feed.summary: Pensionfund Sabic purchased 19,100 shares of Edison International (NYSE:EIX) in the fourth quarter, representing a stake valued at approximately $1.146 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the utility provider, which collectively owns 88.95% of the company. Analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating on EIX, with an average target price of $69.44, following the company's strong Q4 earnings beat and positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Pensionfund Sabic Makes New $1.13 Million Investment in NVR, Inc. $NVR
feed.summary: Pensionfund Sabic has made a new $1.13 million investment in NVR, Inc., acquiring 155 shares during the fourth quarter. This comes amidst other institutional investors also modifying their holdings in the construction company. Despite recent insider selling, NVR announced a $750 million share buyback program and reported an EPS beat, with analysts generally rating the stock as "Hold."

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Has $30.86 Million Stock Position in NVR, Inc. $NVR
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly increased its stake in NVR, Inc. by 669.5% in the fourth quarter, now holding 4,232 shares valued at $30.86 million. Other institutional investors like Assenagon Asset Management S.A. and Nordea Investment Management AB also boosted their NVR holdings. The article details recent insider stock sales, analyst ratings, and NVR's financial performance, including its beat on Q4 earnings estimates and a new stock buyback authorization.

feed.title: BofA Finance (BAC) $710K NVDA-linked auto-callable notes with 15.65% coupon
feed.summary: BofA Finance LLC has priced $710,000 of contingent income auto-callable notes linked to NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA), offering a 15.65% annual contingent coupon. These 18-month notes are automatically callable quarterly if NVDA's stock price meets or exceeds the call value, with principal at risk if NVDA falls significantly below its starting value at maturity. The initial estimated value was less than the public offering price, reflecting associated fees and hedging costs, and investors face credit risk from BofA Finance and Bank of America Corporation, as well as tax uncertainty.

feed.title: New TLD Option Brings Affordable Style To The EcoBoost S650
feed.summary: Ford has introduced a new 2026 Mustang EcoBoost Premium TLD Signature Edition, developed in collaboration with Troy Lee Designs. This special edition brings a motorsports-inspired aesthetic to the turbo four-cylinder coupe, featuring bold graphics, GT hardware upgrades, and a Carmine Red interior. Limited to 550 units, the package adds $3,000 to the sticker price, with orders opening on March 27.

feed.title: Korn Ferry flags changing leadership trends with workforce less willing to manage
feed.summary: Korn Ferry reports a significant shift in leadership trends, noting that the modern workforce is less inclined to pursue management roles or early retirement. This trend necessitates changes in how organizations approach leadership development and succession planning. The firm also highlights rising concerns among workers about AI-driven job displacement and advises companies to prepare for major shifts in hiring practices by 2026.

feed.title: Kodiak Sciences reports positive GLOW2 trial results for Zenkuda By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kodiak Sciences Inc. announced positive results from its GLOW2 Phase 3 study of Zenkuda (tarcocimab tedromer) for treating diabetic retinopathy, leading to a significant increase in its stock price. The study met its primary endpoint, showing substantial improvement in diabetic retinopathy severity and an 85% risk reduction in sight-threatening complications. The company plans to expedite its Biologics License Application submission based on these findings, although InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued.

feed.title: Kinder Morgan, Phillips 66 Extend Open Season for Proposed Pipeline Between Midwest and California
feed.summary: Kinder Morgan and Phillips 66 have extended the binding open season for their proposed convertible crude oil pipeline, now called the Freedom Pipeline, until December 15, 2014. The pipeline, which would transport crude oil from the Midwest to California, is designed to reduce the region's reliance on foreign crude and offer competitive rates. The extension allows potential shippers more time to evaluate the project and potentially make long-term commitments.

feed.title: Charles Schwab launches teen brokerage account for ages 13-17
feed.summary: Charles Schwab has introduced "Schwab Teen Investor," a joint brokerage account for individuals aged 13-17 and a parent or guardian, allowing teens to trade various securities with parental oversight. The initiative is supported by survey data showing high interest in investing among teens and parents, with the account offering no minimum deposit, $0 commissions for online equity trades, and educational incentives. This move aligns with Schwab's ongoing expansion of its retail investor base and strong financial performance.

feed.title: Williams Sonoma 10-K: $7.8B Revenue, $8.84 Diluted EPS
feed.summary: Williams Sonoma reported net revenues of $7,806.8 million and a record diluted earnings per share of $8.84 for fiscal 2025, driven by cost control and tariff mitigation. The company achieved strong financial performance despite a shorter fiscal year, with significant operating income and effective management of supply-chain efficiencies. Investments in technology, stores, and the supply chain, alongside robust retail and e-commerce growth, contributed to these positive results.

feed.title: Lifezone Metals (NYSE: LZM) sets 2026 AGM to ratify auditor and re-elect directors
feed.summary: Lifezone Metals Limited (NYSE: LZM) will hold its Annual General Meeting (AGM) on May 5, 2026, where shareholders will vote on receiving the 2025 financial accounts, ratifying BDO LLP as auditor, and re-electing Class III directors Keith Liddell and Chris Showalter. The record date for voting is May 3, 2026, and the company confirmed having 85,509,302 ordinary shares outstanding as of March 24, 2026. Directors and executive officers collectively own about 34.5% of the voting power.

feed.title: INVESTOR DEADLINE: Oracle Corporation (ORCL) Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Oracle Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Oracle Corporation (ORCL) for investors who purchased common stock between June 12, 2025 and December 16, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Oracle made false or misleading statements regarding its AI infrastructure strategy, capital expenditures, debt, and credit rating, leading to substantial investor losses. Investors with significant losses have the opportunity to serve as lead plaintiff in the lawsuit.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies (NYSE: KEYS) CEO sells 1,667 company shares
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE: KEYS) President and CEO Satish Dhanasekaran sold 1,667 shares of common stock at $300.00 per share on March 24, 2026, in an open-market transaction. Following this sale, he retains a significant holding of 122,397.578 shares, indicating a continued substantial stake in the company. The transaction was a straightforward discretionary sale, not related to options or tax withholding, and is noted to have a negative impact sentiment.

feed.title: Keysight (KEYS) CFO Dougherty sells 2,000 shares in open-market trade
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies EVP and CFO Neil Dougherty sold 2,000 shares of company stock in an open-market transaction on March 24, 2026, at an average price of $298.37 per share. Following this sale, Dougherty directly holds approximately 125,272 shares of Keysight common stock. The transaction, reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, represents a small adjustment to his overall equity position.

feed.title: Keysight (NYSE: KEYS) SVP Li sells 2,000 shares at $297
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies SVP and Secretary Jeffrey K. Li sold 2,000 shares of common stock on March 24, 2026, at an average price of $297.19 per share. Following this transaction, Li directly holds 34,499.146 shares of Keysight common stock. This insider trading activity was reported via an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Regions Bank Names Tombras Creative Agency of Record
feed.summary: Regions Bank has selected independent agency Tombras as its creative agency of record following a consultant-led review. Tombras will be responsible for overseeing the bank's creative strategy and marketing efforts, with the goal of enhancing brand differentiation and driving customer growth. The first campaign, set to launch in late summer 2026, will focus on Regions' partnership with the SEC and will target both general market and multicultural audiences.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Paychex to $99 From $120, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has reduced its price target for Paychex ($PAYX) to $99 from $120, while keeping a "Neutral" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a series of similar target price revisions from other major financial institutions. Despite these changes, Paychex recently reported strong third-quarter results that topped Street views, and reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 EPS growth guidance.

feed.title: News Corp launches up to $1B 2025 share repurchase; $142.3M repurchased to date
feed.summary: News Corp (NWS) has announced a 2025 share repurchase program, authorizing up to US$1 billion for Class A and Class B common stock. To date, the company has already repurchased approximately US$142.3 million worth of shares under this program. Repurchases are subject to market conditions and stock price, with daily ASX filings reporting these transactions.

feed.title: Huntington names 24 pro golfers as brand ambassadors
feed.summary: Huntington National Bank has announced a team of 24 professional golfers, including high-profile names like Scottie Scheffler, to serve as brand ambassadors for the 2026 season. This move aims to leverage popular golfing figures to promote the bank's brand. The article also briefly mentions related news regarding Huntington's expansion and acquisitions.

feed.title: The SpaceX IPO and the Elon Musk Factor
feed.summary: The upcoming SpaceX IPO, valued at $1.75 trillion, will be significantly influenced by the "Musk Effect," a phenomenon observed in Tesla's stock where Elon Musk's actions cause extreme market volatility. With a remarkably thin float of 3%-4% of equity, SpaceX is predicted to experience even more pronounced 20%-30% stock swings in response to Musk-driven news, compared to Tesla's 10%-15%. Additionally, investors will have to contend with SpaceX's historical tendency to deliver on targets late, requiring a credibility discount on management timelines.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Acquires 214,799 Shares of KKR & Co. Inc. $KKR
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly increased its stake in KKR & Co. Inc. by 209.1% in the fourth quarter, purchasing 214,799 shares and now holding 317,531 shares valued at $40.48 million. This coincides with major insider purchases by KKR's CEO and a Director, who collectively acquired a substantial number of shares, indicating strong management confidence. Despite some mixed recent news including a Moody's downgrade of a KKR private credit fund and rising short interest, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price of $149.00.

feed.title: IBM quantum system reproduces neutron tests on a real crystal
feed.summary: IBM and its partners have successfully demonstrated that a quantum computer can accurately simulate real magnetic materials, reproducing neutron scattering data from the KCuF3 crystal. This achievement, enabled by lower two-qubit error rates and new algorithms, marks a significant step towards using quantum computers for scientific discovery and could have long-term implications for fields like materials design, superconductors, and medical imaging. The collaboration involved several DOE-funded Quantum Science Center labs and universities, highlighting the potential for quantum-centric supercomputing in scientific workflows.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Boosts Position in Ameriprise Financial, Inc. $AMP
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly increased its stake in Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE:AMP) by 35.3% in the fourth quarter. Several other hedge funds also adjusted their holdings in the financial services provider. This news comes amidst recent insider stock sales and the company's announcement of a quarterly dividend and strong earnings results.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Raises Stock Position in HP Inc. $HPQ

This comes as HP focuses on AI integration with new workstations and ecosystems, although one insider recently sold a large portion of their shares. Analysts currently rate HP with a "Reduce" consensus, despite recent EPS beats and a strong dividend yield.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Has $36.13 Million Position in Stride, Inc. $LRN

feed.title: Pacifica Partners Inc. Sells 4,048 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Pacifica Partners Inc. reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 7.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 4,048 shares, though Alphabet remains its largest holding. Despite recent insider selling, Alphabet reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend. The company holds a "Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $345.71.
